events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need respond exactly one valid JSON object, no prose markdown. Need fill fields. Scenario: commercial construction, lockout/tagout, observed field condition lock without tag / tag without lock, work in progress, reference OSHA 1910.147. Evaluate sequence and state what must happen before work can continue. Need output decision likely fail because dangerous/non-compliant. Need risk high or critical? Lockout/tagout missing tag or lock is serious but not necessarily imminent injury. The condition: lock without tag / tag without lock violates OSHA requiring both lock and tag unless only one allowed under certain conditions (1910.147(c)(2)(ii) and devices). For hazardous energy control, each energy isolating device must be affixed with lockout/tagout device by authorized employee. Usually both a lock and a tag. If only lock or only tag, non-compliant. Decision fail, risk high. Work stage in-progress. Component conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 50? Value irrelevant maybe 0. Sound_source, event_time, rate, order not audio, can leave defaults: sound_source "", event_time 0.0, rate 0.0, order [] or maybe sequence order? The field order is for audio/video tasks when requested. Could set empty list. workable empty list because work cannot continue until corrected? But maybe LOTO steps can continue after correction; the task asks what must happen before work can continue. So actions: install proper lock and tag combination on each energy isolating device, verify zero energy state, ensure authorized employee only removes. Findings. references OSHA 1910.147. Need valid JSON with no markdown. Ensure no extra keys. Need confidence 0.95. Percent_complete maybe 60. Value 0. Workable maybe empty array [] since work must stop until corrected. Need include rationale. component_conditions list installed-defective and non-compliant? The allowed categories include installed-defective, non-compliant, worn, degraded, failed. Both installed-defective and non-compliant. Good. Decision fail. Risk high (or critical). I think high is appropriate.

events.label: response
events.text: {"decision": "fail", "risk": "high", "work_stage": "in-progress", "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"], "percent_complete": 50, "value": 0, "sound_source": "", "confidence": 0.95, "event_time": 0.0, "rate": 0.0, "order": [], "workable": [], "findings": ["Energy isolating device has a lock without tag or tag without lock", "LOTO device application does not meet required lock-and-tag combination", "Unauthorized or unverified re-energization risk exists"], "actions": ["Stop work and apply both an authorized lock and a tag to each energy isolating device", "Verify zero energy state before any work continues", "Confirm only the authorized employee who applied the lockout/tagout removes it", "Re-train involved employees on proper LOTO sequence", "Inspect and accept the LOTO setup before resuming work"], "rationale": "OSHA 1910.147 requires energy isolating devices to be secured with appropriate lockout and/or tagout devices by authorized employees. A lock without a tag or a tag without a lock does not provide the required warning and physical restraint, creating a hazard of unexpected energization or startup. Work must stop until each device is properly locked and tagged and zero energy state is verified.", "references": ["OSHA 1910.147"]}
